ogTitle: Yuleba South vs Yuruga: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Yuleba South and Yuruga.
heading: Yuleba South vs Yuruga — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Yuleba South, Queensland and Yuruga, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Yuruga has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Yuleba South (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Yuleba South or Yuruga safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Yuleba South has a flood risk score of 46/100, while Yuruga scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Yuleba South scores 42/100 for bushfire risk. Yuruga scores 25/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Yuleba South or Yuruga?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Yuruga has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.9% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
